actions.effects: Place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Falling Skies
actions.effects: Once per activation. Target a marker. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage and be moved up to 2". Then, remove the target.
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.

triggers.name: Reposition
triggers.text: Move this model up to 3".

actions.name: Fly With Me
actions.effects: This model may target a friendly model within 2". Place this model within range. If this action received a raise, place the target (if any) in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Ramming Speed
abilities.text: This model's (melee) actions generated by the Charge action receive +1 Skl and any one suit to its final duel totals.

abilities.name: You Take the Wheel
abilities.text: Once per turn. After this model resolves the Walk action, it may discard a card to declare the Interact action, ignoring engagement. This Interact action may target a marker with enemies in base contact with it.

actions.name: Catch in the Treads
actions.effects: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Reposition
triggers.text: Move this model up to 3".

actions.name: Flamethrower
actions.effects: Enemy models within 1" of the target gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Rampage
triggers.text: Move this model 5", ignoring enemy models. Models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: All-Terrain Turtle
actions.effects: Move this model 4", ignoring models and terrain. Models moved through this way must each pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 1 damage.

abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

abilities.name: Shared Luck
abilities.text: Once per activation. Friendly models within 2" may cheat fate with the top card of their fate deck.

abilities.name: Tempting Fate
abilities.text: Once per game. When a friendly master is killed, this model may drain two (soulstone). If it does so, deal 4 irreducible damage to this model, then the friendly master heals 4.

actions.name: Road Kill
actions.effects: This model may remove a non-Scheme marker within 1" to receive a (+).

triggers.name: Bowled Over
triggers.text: Move the target 4" away, then move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (fortitude) abilities.

triggers.name: Delay
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token.

actions.name: Steamroller
actions.effects: Once per activation. Move this model 12" in a straight line, ignoring models and vertical distance. Any markers this model moves through in this way are removed.

triggers.name: Squash 'Em Good
triggers.text: Enemy models moved through this way must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Slow token.

triggers.name: Four-Leafed Clover
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: Insignificant
abilities.text: This model cannot declare the Interact action and is ignored for strategies and schemes.

abilities.name: Quick Study
abilities.text: This model gains the keywords of the friendly leader.

actions.name: Terrible Luck
actions.effects: If this attack received a raise, make a Scheme marker within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Delay
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Lucky Fate
triggers.text: This model must be engaging an enemy model and cannot have a Summon token. Replace this model with the Lucky Fate, Emissary, then this model heals 6.

actions.name: Team Effort
actions.effects: Target gains an Impact token.

abilities.name: Butterfly Jump
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action targeting this model, this model may move up to 3".

actions.name: Sharp Claws
actions.effects: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Plaintive Cry
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must each pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain an Adversary token.

actions.name: Evading Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Until the end of the current activation, this model cannot declare attack actions.
